sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stratus Properties (STRS) director takes fee in stock award
feed.summary: Stratus Properties Inc. director Laurie L. Dotter received 198 shares of common stock at $30.52 per share, totaling $6K in value, as part of her annual retainer fee in lieu of cash. Following this transaction, she beneficially owns 19,007 common shares, which includes 3,380 restricted stock units. This acquisition was reported in a Form 4 filing and is categorized as a compensation-related grant rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: [Form 4] PUBLIC SERVICE ENTERPRISE GROUP INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Ralph A. LaRossa, Chair, President, and CEO of PUBLIC SERVICE ENTERPRISE GROUP INC (PEG), sold 2,083 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026, at a weighted average price of $81.244 per share. Following this open-market transaction, LaRossa directly holds 291,397.9713 shares. The sale, reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, was executed as part of a 10b5-1 plan.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) director receives 247-share equity retainer grant
feed.summary: Elizabeth I. Holland, a director at VICI Properties Inc. (VICI), received a grant of 247 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026, as part of her annual committee retainer fee under the company's 2017 Stock Incentive Plan. These shares were issued at no cash cost. Following this transaction, Holland directly holds 58,526 shares of VICI common stock.

feed.title: VICI PROPERTIES (NYSE: VICI) director awarded 320 common shares
feed.summary: VICI Properties director Michael D. Rumbolz was awarded 320 common shares on April 1, 2026, as part of his annual committee retainer fee under the company's 2017 Stock Incentive Plan. Following this grant, Rumbolz directly holds 70,774 common shares, with an additional 19,225 shares held indirectly through the Michael and Geri Rumbolz Living Trust 2000. This transaction is classified as a neutral filing impact due to it being compensation rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: MetLife Investment Management Names Andrea Drasites Head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management (MIM) has appointed Andrea Drasites as the new global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance, effective October 1, 2026. Drasites, formerly of Blackstone, will oversee MIM's substantial commercial mortgage, equity real estate, and agricultural investments portfolios, which totaled $108.9 billion in gross assets as of December 31, 2025. Her appointment follows MIM's recent acquisition of PineBridge Investments, enhancing its position as a diversified global asset manager.

feed.title: Franklin Resources schedules April 28 earnings release, 11 a.m. call
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. (NYSE: BEN) is scheduled to release its second-quarter operating results on April 28, 2026, at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Following the release, CEO Jenny Johnson, Co-President, CFO and COO Matthew Nicholls, and Co-President and Chief Commercial Officer Daniel Gamba will host a live teleconference at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results and answer questions. Investors can access the teleconference and a written commentary on the results via the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: 300 million health records: Regeneron puts up to $200M into TriNetX
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: REGN) has announced a strategic collaboration with TriNetX, involving an investment of up to $200 million, to access TriNetX's de-identified electronic health record (EHR) network, which contains approximately 300 million patient records globally, including 170 million in the U.S. This partnership will enable Regeneron to expand its Genetics Center's (RGC) EHR-linked database and enhance its AI training algorithms for digital health solutions. The collaboration aims to accelerate drug discovery, development, and the creation of innovative digital health tools, all while adhering to strict privacy laws like HIPAA and GDPR.

feed.title: MIOSHA Recognizes Cintas Westland Facility with MVPP Star Award
feed.summary: The Michigan Occupational Safety and Health Administration (MIOSHA) honored Cintas Corporation's K15 facility in Westland with the Michigan Voluntary Protection Program (MVPP) Star Award, its highest recognition for workplace safety. This award acknowledges employers who surpass regulatory compliance through comprehensive safety management systems, active employee involvement, and proactive hazard control. Cintas K15, which serves pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and electronics industries, is one of only 29 worksites in Michigan to achieve this status, reflecting Cintas's broader commitment to workplace safety with over 140 VPP Star sites nationwide.

feed.title: With GOJO acquisition finalized, company rebrands as Clorox Purell
feed.summary: Akron-based GOJO Industries, known for Purell hand sanitizer, has completed its acquisition by The Clorox Company and will now operate under the new name Clorox Purell. The $2.25 billion cash purchase will keep the business headquartered in Akron, with GOJO President Carey Jaros

feed.title: Bear of the Day: International Paper (IP)
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has been designated as a "Strong Sell" by Zacks Investment Research due to declining demand, restructuring costs, and plant closures, leading to a significant stock price drop. Analysts have cut earnings estimates for 2026 and 2027 as demand for box shipments and packaging weakens. The stock is considered "dead money" until there is clearer evidence of earnings stabilization and improved demand.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Stock: Leader in Robotic-Assisted Surgery Faces Growth Challenges Amid Mark
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) dominates the robotic-assisted surgery market with its da Vinci systems, offering precision and efficiency in medical procedures. Despite its strong market position and robust procedural growth, the company faces challenges from increasing competition and relies on continued execution on new platforms for sustained growth. North American investors view ISRG as a compelling long-term investment due to its alignment with demographic trends and innovative technology, though risks like regulatory scrutiny and economic headwinds exist.

feed.title: Director Craig Rogerson granted stock units in PPL Corp (NYSE: PPL)
feed.summary: PPL Corp director Craig A. Rogerson was granted 1,140.214 stock units under the Directors Deferred Compensation Plan (DDCP) at a reference value of $38.37 per unit. This deferred compensation, not an open-market purchase, brings his total holdings to 245,480.199 stock units, including reinvested dividends. Payout of these units will occur following his retirement from the board.

feed.title: Constellation files at FERC to keep Crane nuclear restart on 2027 timeline
feed.summary: Constellation Energy is seeking federal assistance from FERC to overcome an interconnection bottleneck that threatens to delay the restart of its Crane Clean Energy Center, the former Three Mile Island Unit 1, beyond its planned 2027 timeline. The company aims to transfer capacity injection rights from its Eddystone station to Crane to preserve the restart schedule, which is backed by a $1 billion DOE loan and a 20-year power purchase agreement with Microsoft. Additionally, Constellation plans to transition its remaining eight pressurized water reactors to 24-month refueling cycles starting in 2028, expecting reduced operational costs and increased generation capacity.

feed.title: Susan Ramirez named Principal Accounting Officer at Bank of Marin
feed.summary: Bank of Marin has appointed Susan Ramirez as its new Principal Accounting Officer, effective April 2, 2026. Ramirez, a licensed CPA, joined the bank in May 2025 as First Vice President and Controller, bringing experience from Summit Funding, Rabobank, N.A., and Mechanics Bank.

feed.title: Kenneth E. Johnson to Step Down as Cable One COO, Becoming Senior Advisor
feed.summary: Kenneth E. Johnson will step down as Chief Operating Officer of Cable One (CABO) on May 1, 2026, and will transition into a role as senior advisor for the company until January 2027. This change is not due to any disagreement with the company regarding operational, policy, control, financial, or accounting matters. The company has not yet disclosed information about his replacement.

feed.title: PPL (PPL) director Natica von Althann awarded 1,140 new stock units
feed.summary: PPL Corp director Natica von Althann was awarded 1,140.214 additional deferred stock units, each linked to PPL common stock, at a reference price of $38.37 per unit, as part of her board compensation. These units are granted under the Directors Deferred Compensation Plan, with payment in common shares occurring after her retirement. Following this transaction, von Althann now holds a total of 107,614.287 stock units, which include reinvested dividends.

feed.title: Boeing, Lockheed Martin, BAE, Honeywell Aerospace ink deals with Defense Department
feed.summary: Several major defense manufacturers, including Boeing, Lockheed Martin, BAE Systems, and Honeywell Aerospace, have signed deals with the U.S. Department of Defense to significantly increase weapons production. This move follows a March meeting with President Donald Trump, where companies agreed to quadruple "Exquisite Class" weaponry output amid the U.S.-Israel war with Iran. The agreements support the "Arsenal of Freedom" strategy, aiming to rebuild the defense industrial base and meet rising global demand.

feed.title: Adobe juggles potential class actions in California over its terms of use
feed.summary: Adobe is facing potential class-action lawsuits in California concerning its terms of use, specifically regarding the automatic renewal of subscription services and the opt-out process. A federal judge questioned Adobe's defense, expressing skepticism about dismissing a case on technicalities and denying a stay based on a similar case. This legal scrutiny follows a $150 million settlement Adobe made with the Department of Justice over hidden termination fees and difficult subscription cancellation processes.

feed.title: Biote (BTMD) details 2026 virtual meeting, board elections and pay
feed.summary: Biote Corp. (BTMD) has announced its 2026 annual virtual stockholder meeting for May 12, 2026, where shareholders will vote on electing two Class I directors and ratifying Deloitte & Touche LLP as its independent auditor. The proxy statement also provided details on board composition, corporate governance, and executive and director compensation, including stock option awards and bonuses tied to the company's 2025 performance. Key financial figures and beneficial ownership information were also disclosed.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE: ZBH) director receives new phantom stock unit grant
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet's director, Maria Teresa Hilado, received a grant of 378.873 phantom stock units as part of her non-employee director compensation, increasing her total holdings to 11,684.719 units. These units, which include 30.381 units from dividend reinvestment, will be settled in cash through ten annual installments after her board service ends. Phantom stock units are cash-settled awards tied to the company's common stock value, providing economic exposure without actual share issuance.

feed.title: PPL Corp (NYSE: PPL) director granted 1,140 stock units under DDCP
feed.summary: PPL Corp director Heather B. Redman was granted 1,140.214 Stock Units under the company's Directors Deferred Compensation Plan (DDCP), increasing her total DDCP holdings to 27,490.404 units. These units, valued at a reference price of $38.37 per share, represent deferred compensation and will be paid out following her retirement. The transaction is a routine award, not an open-market trade, and includes dividend reinvestments.

feed.title: [Form 4] CITIZENS, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article details the insider trading activity of Jon Stenberg, President & CEO of Citizens, Inc. He exercised 13,186 restricted stock units and had 3,211 shares withheld for tax obligations. Additionally, he received a new grant of 42,942 restricted stock units for the 2026 long-term incentive.

feed.title: Colony Bankcorp, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Colony Bankcorp, Inc. (NYSE: CBAN) has announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the stock market closes. A live conference call will follow on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET. The financial results and investor presentation will be accessible on the company's website under the Investor Relations section.

feed.title: Zai Lab Limited And Amgen Inc. Collaborate To Advance DLL3 Targeted Combination Therapy In Small Cell Lung Cancer
feed.summary: Zai Lab Limited and Amgen Inc. have announced a global clinical trial collaboration to assess a DLL3-targeting combination therapy for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer (ES-SCLC). The collaboration will evaluate Zai Lab’s antibody-drug conjugate (ADC), zocilurtatug pelitecan, with Amgen’s bispecific T-cell engager (BiTE) therapy, IMDELLTRA. Amgen will lead a global Phase 1b study to determine the safety and efficacy of this combined approach, aiming to improve treatment response and overcome resistance in ES-SCLC patients.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE: ZBH) director adds phantom stock units award
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. director Arthur J. Higgins received a grant of 308.711 phantom stock units on March 31, 2026, as part of the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Employee Directors. These units, which are convertible on a 1-for-1 basis with common stock but settled in cash, will be paid out in ten annual installments after his service ends. Following this award and dividend reinvestment, Higgins now holds a total of 36,375.195 phantom stock units.

feed.title: Ventas Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) is scheduled to release its first quarter 2026 earnings after the market closes on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company will host a conference call to discuss these earnings on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Details for accessing the call and a webcast replay are provided.

feed.title: Clorox (CLX) director Christopher Williams gains additional deferred stock units
feed.summary: Clorox director Christopher J. Williams has received additional Deferred Stock Units (DSUs) as routine compensation. He acquired 265.3672 units on March 31, 2026, and 212.6390 units on February 13, 2026, bringing his total direct holdings to 22,074.5818 units. These DSUs, some from dividend reinvestment and others in lieu of director fees, will convert into shares of Clorox common stock upon his retirement or termination from the board.

feed.title: BioNTech (NASDAQ: BNTX) outlines virtual 2026 AGM, board expansion and 50% capital authority
feed.summary: BioNTech SE has announced a virtual Annual General Meeting for May 15, 2026, where shareholders will vote on key proposals including carrying forward the 2025 balance sheet profit and expanding the Supervisory Board from six to eight members. The agenda also includes re-electing current board members and electing new oncology and clinical-development specialists. Additionally, shareholders will vote on extending authorization for virtual AGMs and establishing a new Authorized Capital 2026 of up to EUR 129,513,743, representing 50% of current share capital.

feed.title: Canopy Growth (CGC) director’s RSU tax share disposition detailed in Form 4
feed.summary: Canopy Growth Corp Director Joseph Bayern reported a disposition of 2,658 common shares on March 31, 2026, at $0.93 per share, as detailed in a Form 4 filing. This transaction was related to tax obligations arising from the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) granted on November 11, 2025. Following this disposition, Bayern retains 40,000 common shares directly.

feed.title: Canopy Growth (CGC) director disposes RSU shares to cover tax obligations
feed.summary: Canopy Growth Corp Director M. Shan Atkins disposed of 2,074 common shares on March 31, 2026, at $0.93 per share. This transaction was related to tax obligations arising from the vesting of previously granted Restricted Stock Units (RSUs). After this disposition, Atkins directly holds 41,390 common shares, indicating a minimal impact on her overall equity position.

feed.title: Canopy Growth (CGC) director disposes RSU shares to cover taxes
feed.summary: Canopy Growth Corp director Theresa Yanofsky sold 10,373 common shares on March 31, 2026, at $0.93 per share. This disposition was to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) granted on June 3, 2025. After the sale, Yanofsky directly holds 53,145 common shares, indicating a routine tax-related transaction rather than a discretionary reduction of her stake.

feed.title: CDT (NASDAQ: CDT) expands at‑the‑market capacity to $76.1M under AGP pact
feed.summary: CDT (NASDAQ: CDT) has increased its at-the-market (ATM) offering capacity to $76.1 million under its Sales Agreement with A.G.P./Alliance Global Partners. This expansion from a prior capacity of $3.5 million was possible because the company's public float exceeded $75.0 million as of March 24, 2026, allowing it to utilize General Instruction I.B.1 of Form S-3. The company, which is an emerging growth and smaller reporting company, noted a last reported sale price of $5.10 per share on April 1, 2026.

feed.title: General Motors Co Stock (GM) Closed Down by 3.21% on Apr 2: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) stock closed down by 3.21% on April 2, attributed to a 9.7% year-over-year drop in Q1 2026 sales. The decline is driven by broader industry headwinds including elevated vehicle prices, increased borrowing costs, waning consumer sentiment, and challenges in the EV market. Despite a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus, some firms have lowered price targets due to these uncertainties and specific company risks like temporary layoffs and analyst downgrades.

feed.title: Digital Realty (DLR) director receives 152 Long-Term Incentive Units grant
feed.summary: Digital Realty (DLR) director Susan Swanezy was granted 152 Long-Term Incentive Units (LTIP units) as compensation on March 31, 2026, increasing her direct holdings to 3,568 LTIP units. These units, awarded at $0.00 each, are profits interest units in Digital Realty Trust, L.P. that can convert to common units upon meeting certain conditions, and then be redeemed for cash or common stock. This transaction is a non-market compensation award rather than a purchase or sale of common stock.

feed.title: Bank of Marin (Nasdaq: BMRC) adds principal accounting officer, sets Q1 call
feed.summary: Bank of Marin Bancorp (Nasdaq: BMRC) has appointed Susan Ramirez, previously First Vice President and Controller, as its new Principal Accounting Officer, effective April 2. The company also announced its first-quarter earnings call for April 27, 2026, where President Tim Myers and CFO Dave Bonaccorso will discuss results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Bank of Marin, with $3.9 billion in assets, operates 27 branches and eight commercial banking offices in Northern California.

feed.title: Bank of Marin will webcast first-quarter results on April 27
feed.summary: Bank of Marin Bancorp (Nasdaq: BMRC) will host a webcast for its first-quarter earnings on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. PT/11:30 a.m. ET. President and CEO Tim Myers and CFO Dave Bonaccorso will discuss the Company's fiscal first quarter results, which ended March 31, 2026. Investors can access the webcast and a replay through the "Investor Relations" section of Bank of Marin’s website.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband cuts Charter (NASDAQ: CHTR) stake by 643K shares
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband Corp, a major stockholder of Charter Communications, disposed of 643,444 shares of Charter Class A Common Stock at $221.79 per share through an exempt transaction under Rule 16b-3. Following this sale back to Charter, Liberty Broadband still indirectly holds 40,016,863 Charter shares via its wholly-owned subsidiaries, maintaining a significant equity position governed by existing agreements. The transaction is detailed in a recent Form 4 filing, highlighting that it was carried out under specific stockholders and letter agreements.

feed.title: Cable One (CABO) COO steps down, stays on as senior advisor
feed.summary: Cable One, Inc. announced that Chief Operating Officer Kenneth E. Johnson will step down from his COO role on May 1, 2026, transitioning to a senior advisor position until January 2027. The company clarified that this leadership change is not due to any disagreements regarding operations, policies, or financial matters, indicating a planned and structured transition. This information was disclosed in an 8-K filing, emphasizing an orderly handover with advisory support.

feed.title: Broadcom taps Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as next CFO
feed.summary: Broadcom (Nasdaq: AVGO) has announced Amie Thuener, currently Vice President, Corporate Controller and Chief Accounting Officer at Alphabet, will become its new Chief Financial Officer, effective June 12, 2026. She will succeed Kirsten M. Spears, who is retiring but will serve as an advisor for nine months to ensure a smooth transition. Thuener brings extensive experience in global financial reporting and AI-related transactions from her tenure at Alphabet and PricewaterhouseCoopers.

feed.title: Mohawk to release Q1 results April 30, then host call May 1
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE: MHK) will release its First Quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, and will host an earnings conference call on May 1, 2026, at 11:00 am ET. The call will be webcast live via the Investors section of mohawkind.com and will be available for replay until May 29, 2026, and archived for one year. Investors can register online to participate in the live broadcast or access dial-in details.

feed.title: Cal-Maine Q3 net sales drop 53% as egg prices fall
feed.summary: Cal-Maine Foods reported a 53% decrease in net sales for its third quarter of fiscal 2026, falling to US$667 million due to significantly lower shell egg prices. Despite the decline in conventional egg sales, which dropped 72.1%, the company saw growth in its specialty egg and prepared foods sectors, with prepared foods sales surging by 441.2% year over year. Cal-Maine anticipates a recovery in its prepared foods segment, projecting increased production capacity and improved margins in the coming years.

feed.title: Colony Bankcorp, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Colony Bankcorp, Inc. (NYSE: CBAN) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the stock market closes. The company will also host a live conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET to discuss these results. A replay of the call will be available until April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE: ZBH) director adds phantom stock units in deferred award
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet director Robert Hagemann was granted 308.711 phantom stock units, increasing his total deferred balance to 31,982.841 units. These units, which track the company's common stock value, were accrued under the Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Employee Directors and will be settled in cash in five annual installments after his board service concludes. The filing highlights the impact of non-employee director compensation through phantom stock units, which are common in deferred compensation plans.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices Inc Stock (AMD) Closed Up by 3.38% on Apr 2: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc (AMD) stock closed up by 3.38% on April 2nd, driven by several positive developments. These include an increased CPU/GPU market share according to the March 2026 Steam Hardware Survey, an analyst upgrade from Erste Group to "Buy" citing data center demand, and reports of a potential substantial order for AMD MI355 accelerators from a South Korean AI startup. The company's upward movement was also supported by a broader recovery in chip and AI-related stocks.

feed.title: Wonder 3D generative AI model launches
feed.summary: Autodesk has launched Wonder 3D, a new generative AI model within Autodesk Flow Studio, designed to simplify and accelerate the creation of 3D characters and objects. This tool offers Text to 3D, Image to 3D, and Text to Image capabilities, enabling creators to generate and refine 3D assets faster, reducing technical complexity. Wonder 3D aims to expand access to 3D creation for professionals and new creators alike across various industries.

feed.title: Ventas Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) will release its first quarter 2026 earnings after market close on Monday, April 27, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Details for accessing the call and webcast replay are provided.

feed.title: Forbearance puts Borealis Foods (NASDAQ: BRLS) into high‑stakes restructuring
feed.summary: Borealis Foods (NASDAQ: BRLS) has entered a forbearance agreement with Frontwell Capital Partners after multiple loan defaults, including minimum liquidity breaches and violating debt covenants with unsecured notes. The agreement, which runs until April 27, 2026, imposes strict conditions, increased interest rates, and requires the appointment of a Chief Restructuring Officer and a satisfactory refinancing plan. Failure to meet these milestones or refinance could jeopardize the company's ability to continue as a going concern, indicating significant financial distress and a shift in control towards the lender.

feed.title: EQT will post first-quarter results April 21, then take questions
feed.summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results after market close on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will then host a conference call to discuss these results and other matters on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET, which will include a Q&A session for securities analysts. A live audio webcast and archived replay will be available on EQT's investor relations website.

feed.title: EQT Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call – Company Announcement
feed.summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) announced its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results will be released after market close on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results and other relevant matters, followed by a Q&A session for securities analysts. A live audio webcast and archived replay will be available on EQT's investor relations website, ir.eqt.com.

feed.title: Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) awards long-term incentive units to director
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust director VeraLinn Jamieson received a grant of 152 Long-Term Incentive Units as part of her equity-based compensation. These units are profits interest units in Digital Realty Trust, L.P. that can achieve full parity with common partnership units after meeting specified conditions and be converted into common partnership units, which are redeemable for cash or common stock. Following this grant, Jamieson now holds a total of 13,254 Long-Term Incentive Units directly.
